message:
test(tui): add 17 unit tests for thread tree builder and hierarchy (br-2h8pz)

Tests cover tree construction, flatten/collapse, and rendering:
- Empty messages → empty tree
- Single root with no replies
- Three-level nesting (root→child→grandchild)
- Circular and self-referencing messages handled gracefully
- Multiple roots sorted chronologically
- Unread/ack flags preserved through tree building
- Subject truncation to 60 chars
- Compact time extraction (HH:MM:SS from ISO)
- 100-message chain performance (<50ms)
- Wide fan-out (50 children, chronological order)
- Flatten with all-expanded includes all nodes
- Flatten with collapsed parent hides children
- Flatten empty tree
- Render plain label: leaf (•), expanded parent (▼), collapsed (▶)
- Render plain label: unread (*) and ack ([ACK]) markers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
